entry.title: Re: In a multi-app CAP project, how can I trigger navigat...
entry.content: Thank you for your response! Those are the two options I contemplated, I am more inclined towards the second to be honest but the problem is that I don’t really know how to carry out the navigation upon success in the second option to the object page. If you have any examples of the second or even the first option that fit this problematic would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Recap — SAP Data Unleashed 2024

entry.title: System error when loading users in SAP SF: Exception caught:com.successfactors.sca.service.exception
entry.content:
Errors: System error when loading users:

00001700 - Exception caught: com.successfactors.sca.service.exception.ServiceCreateFailedException: can not get personId

User was has been hard purged and should be recreated

I am getting this error when I want to create a new user in SAP SF which was hard purged from SAP SF.

I've tried to Open Check Tool and search for "User Management" application: it should find the user IDs which are not properly configured and should be causing the error But there's no error related to user IDs

entry.title: how to use "Redis, Hyperscaler Option" in spring boot
entry.content:
I create a redis-cache on BTP, and i want to use the redis server in my springboot application, but i don't know how to config the redis properties, the redis-cache server's infomation json is:

{
"password": "k7QMdykZgwusYqbhAKHqP9TDDKSqQ4w40AzCaHEtIEs=",
"hostname": "redis-c32593a9-54bb-4a9c-a25c-74bcf84021b2.redis.cache.windows.net",
"port": 6380,
"uri": "rediss://:k7QMdykZgwusYqbhAKHqP9TDDKSqQ4w40AzCaHEtIEs=@redis-c32593a9-54bb-4a9c-a25c-74bcf84021b2.redis.cache.windows.net:6380",
"cluster_mode": false,
"tls": {
"host": "redis-c32593a9-54bb-4a9c-a25c-74bcf84021b2.redis.cache.windows.net",
"port": 6380,
"ca": "-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- MIIDjjCCAnagAwIBAgIQAzrx5qcRqaC7KGSxHQn65TANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQsFADBh MQswCQYDVQQGEwJVUzEVMBMGA1UEChMMRGlnaUNlcnQgSW5jMRkwFwYDVQQLExB3 d3cuZGlnaWNlcnQuY29tMSAwHgYDVQQDExdEaWdpQ2VydCBHbG9iYWwgUm9vdCBH MjAeFw0xMzA4MDExMjAwMDBaFw0zODAxMTUxMjAwMDBaMGExCzAJBgNVBAYTAlVT MRUwEwYDVQQKEwxEaWdpQ2VydCBJbmMxGTAXBgNVBAsTEHd3dy5kaWdpY2VydC5j b20xIDAeBgNVBAMTF0RpZ2lDZXJ0IEdsb2JhbCBSb290IEcyMIIBIjANBgkqhkiG 9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEAuzfNNNx7a8myaJCtSnX/RrohCgiN9RlUyfuI 2/Ou8jqJkTx65qsGGmvPrC3oXgkkRLpimn7Wo6h+4FR1IAWsULecYxpsMNzaHxmx 1x7e/dfgy5SDN67sH0NO3Xss0r0upS/kqbitOtSZpLYl6ZtrAGCSYP9PIUkY92eQ q2EGnI/yuum06ZIya7XzV+hdG82MHauVBJVJ8zUtluNJbd134/tJS7SsVQepj5Wz tCO7TG1F8PapspUwtP1MVYwnSlcUfIKdzXOS0xZKBgyMUNGPHgm+F6HmIcr9g+UQ vIOlCsRnKPZzFBQ9RnbDhxSJITRNrw9FDKZJobq7nMWxM4MphQIDAQABo0IwQDAP BgNVHRMBAf8EBTADAQH/MA4GA1UdDwEB/wQEAwIBhjAdBgNVHQ4EFgQUTiJUIBiV 5uNu5g/6+rkS7QYXjzkwDQYJKoZIhvcNAQELBQADggEBAGBnKJRvDkhj6zHd6mcY 1Yl9PMWLSn/pvtsrF9+wX3N3KjITOYFnQoQj8kVnNeyIv/iPsGEMNKSuIEyExtv4 NeF22d+mQrvHRAiGfzZ0JFrabA0UWTW98kndth/Jsw1HKj2ZL7tcu7XUIOGZX1NG Fdtom/DzMNU+MeKNhJ7jitralj41E6Vf8PlwUHBHQRFXGU7Aj64GxJUTFy8bJZ91 8rGOmaFvE7FBcf6IKshPECBV1/MUReXgRPTqh5Uykw7+U0b6LJ3/iyK5S9kJRaTe pLiaWN0bfVKfjllDiIGknibVb63dDcY3fe0Dkhvld1927jyNxF1WW6LZZm6zNTfl MrY= -----END CERTIFICATE----- "
}
}

and please help us how to config the redis connection in my springboot application.

entry.title: Re: Converted our system SAP to SAP S4HANA we are facing issue to print any SMARTFORM.
entry.content: we have the same issue, but we have version 7.7 level 16, doesn't work though, according to the sap note 3260025, it should work from patch level 11 on in version 7.70

entry.title: Re: Downloading multiple files as a single zip folder in SAP UI5 Application
entry.content:
you need to declare and initialize the zipContent array before using it.

var zipContent = [];

entry.title: Analytic privilige issue in Embedded SAC
entry.content:
We are using Live connection configuration based on HANA Analytics Adapter between Embedded SAC & our BTP (HANA Cloud DB). Connection is working fine and it is able to bring the data from source to target which is E-SAC in this case.

We want to enable row level authorization or Dynamic authorization based on user login in the reporting layer where we are using Analytic privileges in HANA calculation view with Dynamic restrictions based on Procedure.

Analytic Privilege is working fine as is expected to be however in E-SAC we found that reports are running based on DB runtime user rather than currently logged user. Eg: If I login in SAC then SAC should recognise my user ID which is Subash in this case however it is getting data based on runtime user or session user.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: Can Modify standard programs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Pu...
entry.content:
I'm not a topic expert but I guess the keywords you are looking for could be 'extensibility' or 'key user extensibility'.

Here you can find a comprehensive guide about all kinds of extensibility: https://www.sap.com/documents/2022/10/52e0cd9b-497e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

If you search for 'extensibility' / 'key user extensibility' you can probably also find blogs, videos, tutorials, etc. which are less comprehensive but easier to consume compare to the large guide that I linked.

entry.title: Re: Migration Assessment result is SMALL but no template...
entry.content:
Hello,

I think the issue is that there is a lot of confusion about how to interpret the assessment report. 

The assessment category and effort reflect if the scenario can be migrated to Integration Suite regardless if you use a tool or do it manually. 

We are aware that we suppose very often the default template, we addressed this with a more generic approach which is about to be released by mid of this year. The default template should be history once this is launched. 

kind regards

entry.title: Re: Migration Assessment result is SMALL but no template...
entry.content:
Hi Richi,

Looking forward to the new version. Is there some kind of roadmap available on the Migration Assessment tool? (when will what scenario's be supported)

Regards

Ron

entry.title: EC Business rule for custom field picklist
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We would need to configure in Employee Central a business rule or an association in order to obtain the needed picklist values. We have a custom field in the Comp info portlet: "Pay Change Reason" which currently contains picklist values from all the countries, but the idea would be to have in that field only values based on the Country/Legal Entity of the employee. 

Any recommendation would be appreciated.

Thank you and best regards,

Eli

entry.title: Re: When installing the 32 bit DI API installer, it is no...
entry.content:
Hi Pipalia1,

In SAP Business One version 10.0, almost each and every component is 64-bit only.

Why there is a need for 32-Bit DI API?

Still, if you need it, you need to register the 32-Bit DI API manually.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: System log in SLT
entry.content:
Hi Siba,

You can confirm the timestamp from where you see the error. Then run SM21, filter with proper condition and find the same timestamp there. When you confirmed the relevant entry from SM21, you can also double click it to check the details.

Sometimes, the "job cancelled" error may not mean an error. If you deactivate a configuration, all the running Data Transfer Jobs will be cancelled, and you will see same message.

Thanks,

Li

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi everyone! 

A long-awaited update: Effective today, SAP Java Buildpack 2 now supports Java 21. See release notes.

entry.title: How to create RAP Action to generate a file to download?
entry.content:
In BTP ABAP Environment, I have a RAP entity with an action. Let's call the action 'generateFile'. In that action, I have specific logic that uses the XCO classes to build out an XLSX file. The RAP entity and its action are projected and exposed into a Fiori Elements application. The action is triggered from a user pressing a button.

The final step is that the XLSX file that is generated needs to be automatically downloaded to the user's frontend. Is there a way of doing that from the action itself? Or do I need to handle this from the Fiori app (meaning, no way to test the action from the OData service preview)?

entry.title: Re: SAP business Bydesign
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. When I say "Customer Return" I am referring to the voucher that can be found in the workcenter below. Sales Order > Return When you receive a return of goods from a customer, you create and release the slips in the following order, right? 1.Customer Return Notification 2.Inbound Delivery 3.Return I am now looking for a Data Source that can share 3 and 1 or 3 and 2 above. If that DataSource is available, I will use the Return ID to get the Inbound Delivery information (ActualDelivery Date, Doc Type). Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

entry.title: Re: FireFighter ID login issue - FFID Status is in Red
entry.content:
Hello,

What is your GRCFND_A SP level? Have you updated this component lately?
Since SP21 there was a big change in the way how whole FF solution works and since then SAP released a bunch of notes.

I believe that I came across exactly the same problem at some point when investigating and fixing this SP21.

entry.title: Re: SAP business Bydesign
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. When I say "Customer Return" I am referring to the voucher that can be found in the workcenter below. Sales Order > Return When you receive a return of goods from a customer, you create and release the slips in the following order, right? 1.Customer Return Notification 2.Inbound Delivery 3.Return I am now looking for a Data Source that can share 3 and 1 or 3 and 2 above. If that DataSource is available, I will use the Return ID to get the Inbound Delivery information (ActualDelivery Date, Doc Type).

entry.title: Re: router.GetRoute("xxx").attachMatched not picking up s...
entry.content:
If you set the property greedy on the route, matching event will fire for it even if another route has already been matched. By default it is false and so only the first matching route will fire. This is shown in the sample / Routing / Route / Route Patterns.  Here greedy is set to true. 

See: greedy in properties for Route Settings

You mention subroutes in the title. There was a concept of subroutes till v 1.28, it is now deprecated and replaced by nested routes.  See parent in  properties for Route Settings. Perhaps this is what you want.

entry.title: Re: SLT Central finance data replication using RFC commut...
entry.content:
SLT generates 3 function module for replication process.
OLI module - remote FM that is created on source system
OLC module - situated in central control system
OLO module - remote FM is created on target system.
The replication process run OLC module, that first remotely call OLI to read the data from source, then remotely call OLO module and transfer data there. OLO module calls the cFIN function module, that post incoming data into corresponding tables

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:

entry.title: Strategic Expansion: K.Hartwall Acquires Retailquip to Fortify APAC Presence
entry.content:
Dear Editor,

I trust this message finds you well. I'm reaching out to share a pivotal development from K.Hartwall, a Finnish family-owned leader in intralogistics solutions, that underscores our commitment to growth and innovation in the logistics sector, particularly in the APAC region.

On April 3, 2024, K.Hartwall officially announced its acquisition of the Australian company Retailquip. This strategic move not only marks a significant milestone in the company’s global expansion efforts but also strengthens K.Hartwall’s footprint in Australia and the broader APAC region.

 

Highlights of the Acquisition:

Long-standing Collaboration:The partnership between K.Hartwall and Retailquip dates back over two decades, beginning with the introduction of Compactainers to Coles-Myer in 2005. This acquisition is a natural progression of our synergistic relationship.

Strategic Growth: The acquisition is aligned with K.Hartwall's strategic growth plan, aiming to enhance our market position and offer more adaptive solutions to our customers, including innovative rental business models.

Focus on Automation: Retailquip will serve as a pivotal hub for K.Hartwall in the APAC region, particularly for developing our stronghold in automation, responding to the growing demand for efficient logistics solutions.

Continued Leadership: Clare Hart-Davies, Managing Director of Retailquip, along with her team, will remain at the helm, ensuring continuity and reliability for customers and building on Retailquip’s success in the Australian market.

The partnership between K.Hartwall and Retailquip is rooted in a shared commitment to sustainability, quality, efficiency, and exceptional customer service. This collaboration aims to introduce Nordic innovation to the Australian supply chain sector, promising to enhance local support while positioning itself as a major player in the APAC region. The synergy of these two companies highlights a forward-looking approach to logistics, emphasizing the importance of sustainable practices and innovative solutions in shaping the future of the industry

For more details on this exciting development and what it means for the future of logistics and supply chain management in Australia and the APAC region, please find the complete press release attached. You can also find high resolution images on our newsroom through the link below. All content is freely available to you to publish as you wish.

https://ins-news.com/en/100/954/3158/Finnish-KHartwall-and-their-Australian-distribution-partner-Retailquip-join-forces.htmhttp://www.ins-news.com/

Thank you for your time in considering this article. If you have any questions about the product, comments, or feedback on the content, or decide to cover the news, I would be delighted to hear from you.

Kind Regards,

Sam Johnsson

entry.title: Re: SAP SLT replication with RFC
entry.content:
You cannot  replicate data into HANA DB (on DB level) if you don't create secondary DB connection. But connection could managed by SLT (in this case connection will be created by SLT and deleted also by SLT when configuration is deleted) or not managed by SLT (when you created own connection).

Alternative, if you have ABAP stack over the target HANA DB you can use scenario RFC - RFC. But in such case replication is possible only into ABAP schema.

entry.title: Re: RFC Communication failure-recurring data services job
entry.content:
Hi @siba_pkd21 - is this on a Version previous to DS 4.2 SP14 Patch 4? Have you checked the following Note:

https://me.sap.com/notes/0002989910

It recommends on upgrading to PL 4 of SP14

entry.title: Re: JWT With RSA256 Encryption ABAP Stack
entry.content:
Hello FI3,

Could you please check this code?

 

 

PRIVATE SECTION.
    TYPES:
      BEGIN OF ty_jwt_header,
        alg TYPE string,
        typ TYPE string,
      END OF ty_jwt_header .

    TYPES:
      BEGIN OF ty_jwt_payload,
        secret TYPE string, " private key
        iat    TYPE i, "Issued At
        exp    TYPE i, "Expiration Time
      END OF ty_jwt_payload .
METHOD generate_jwttoken.
    TRY.
        DATA(ls_header) = VALUE ty_jwt_header( alg = me->t_params[ name = c_alg ]-value  "HS256
                                               typ = me->t_params[ name = c_typ ]-value ).  "JWT

        DATA(lv_json_header) = /ui2/cl_json=>serialize( data        = ls_header
                                                        compress    = abap_on
                                                        pretty_name = /ui2/cl_json=>pretty_mode-low_case ).
        DATA(lv_b64_header) = cl_http_utility=>if_http_utility~encode_base64( lv_json_header ).

        DATA(lv_currentts) = zcl_bc_util=>generate_timestamp( iv_tzone = 'TURKEY' ).
        DATA(lv_plus5min)  = lv_currentts + 300.
        DATA(ls_payload)   = VALUE ty_jwt_payload( secret = me->t_params[ name = c_private ]-value
                                                   iat    = lv_currentts
                                                   exp    = lv_plus5min ).

        DATA(lv_json_payload) = /ui2/cl_json=>serialize( data        = ls_payload
                                                         compress    = abap_on
                                                         pretty_name = /ui2/cl_json=>pretty_mode-low_case ).
        DATA(lv_b64_payload) = cl_http_utility=>if_http_utility~encode_base64( lv_json_payload ).
        DATA(lv_xpublic)     = zcl_bc_util=>conv_string_to_xstring( CONV string( me->t_params[ name = c_public ]-value ) ).
        DATA(lv_data)        = lv_b64_header && '.' && lv_b64_payload.

        cl_abap_hmac=>calculate_hmac_for_char( EXPORTING if_algorithm     = CONV string( me->t_params[ name = c_algorithm ]-value )  "SHA256
                                                         if_key           = lv_xpublic
                                                         if_data          = lv_data
                                               IMPORTING ef_hmacb64string = DATA(lv_b64_hmac) ).

        DATA(lv_off) = strlen( lv_b64_hmac ) - 1.
        lv_b64_hmac  = lv_b64_hmac(lv_off).

        REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF: '/' IN lv_b64_hmac WITH '_',
                                    '+' IN lv_b64_hmac WITH '-'.

        me->v_token  = lv_data && '.' && lv_b64_hmac.

      CATCH cx_abap_message_digest INTO DATA(lx_hmac). " Exception Class for Message Digest
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE zcx_kw
          EXPORTING
            textid = lx_hmac->if_t100_message~t100key.

*      CATCH zcx_bc_util INTO DATA(lx_bc). " 
*        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE zcx_kw
*          EXPORTING
*            textid = lx_bc->if_t100_message~t100key.

    ENDTRY.
ENDMETHOD.

 

 

 

 

 

METHOD generate_timestamp.
*   IMPORTING !iv_tzone      TYPE tznzone DEFAULT 'UTC'
*   RETURNING VALUE(rv_secs) TYPE tzntstmpl
*   RAISING   zcx_bc_util.

    DATA ts1 TYPE c LENGTH 20.

    GET TIME STAMP FIELD DATA(ts).
    CONVERT TIME STAMP ts TIME ZONE iv_tzone INTO DATE DATA(dt) TIME DATA(tm).
    ts1 = dt && tm.

    DATA(ts2) = CONV tzntstmpl( '19700101000000' ).

    TRY.
        " Time Interval in Seconds
        rv_secs = CONV int4( cl_abap_tstmp=>subtract( EXPORTING tstmp1 = CONV tzntstmpl( ts1 )
                                                                tstmp2 = ts2 ) ).

      CATCH cx_parameter_invalid_range INTO DATA(lx_range). " Parameter with invalid value range
        "DATA(ls_t100) = set_message_from_obj( lx_range ).

      CATCH cx_parameter_invalid_type INTO DATA(lx_type).  " Parameter with Invalid Type
        "ls_t100 = set_message_from_obj( lx_type ).

    ENDTRY.

    CHECK ls_t100 IS NOT INITIAL.
*    RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE zcx_bc_util
*      EXPORTING
*        textid = ls_t100.

ENDMETHOD.

 

 

 

 

METHOD conv_string_to_xstring.
    DATA: ls_t100 TYPE scx_t100key.

    CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING'
      EXPORTING
        text     = iv_str
        mimetype = 'charset=utf-8'
        encoding = '4110'
      IMPORTING
        buffer   = rv_xstr
      EXCEPTIONS
        failed   = 1
        OTHERS   = 2.

    CHECK sy-subrc <> 0.

*    ls_t100 = set_messagge_from_sy( ).

*    RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE zcx_bc_util
*      EXPORTING
*        textid = ls_t100.

ENDMETHOD.

 

 

Good luck.

Caner.

entry.title: Does SAP C4C Mobile app support SAP Fiori SDK for launching Fiori app using mashups in offline mode?
entry.content:
I'm currently exploring the capabilities of the SAP Cloud for Customer (C4C) Mobile app and its integration with SAP Fiori SDKs. Specifically, I'm interested in understanding whether the SAP C4C Mobile app supports the utilization of SAP Fiori Software Development Kits (SDKs) to launch Fiori applications while offline, particularly using mashups.

Could anyone with experience in this area provide insights or guidance? I'd appreciate any information on how feasible it is to leverage SAP Fiori SDKs for offline Fiori app launches with mashups within the SAP C4C Mobile app environment.

Thank you in advance for your assistance!

entry.title: Re: CBC 2SL customer using CLT service
entry.content:
Hi Jin,

this should be answered by the SAP CBC colleagues. I added the according tag.

@CBC: Can you answer this one?

Best regards,

Nils Buerckel

entry.title: How to use Fiori-Launchpad and integrated 3rd-Party Website behind a Reverse-Proxy (nginx) to avoid
entry.content:
Hello Community,
We have developed a UI5-Control that integrates an external Web-Page of a 3rd-Party Application to a UI5-App. The resulting UI5-App is configured to be used in a Fiori-Launchpad of an S/4 onPremise (2020).
Problem is, that this sap-system and the 3rd-Party Web-Page running in our Control (using IFrames) have different domains. So we have a Cross-Domain Issue.
One solution could be, to allow the domain of the S/4-System in the 3rd-Party WebSite to IFrame it, using the "Access-Control-Allow-Orign" Headers. 
But in our case this is not sufficent due to we need access to an api of 3rd-Party WebSite to control its behaviour. But this api is only available as an object inside the WebPage. And this is also not allowed in CORS-Policy.

Our proposed solution is to use a reverse-proxy, in this case nginx. Nginx is installed at a seperate server, with its own (sub)-domain and a valid certificate. This reverse proxy shell present one host to the browser client and both domains (one for sap with its fiori-Launchpad and one for the 3rd-Party Website) shell be accessible behind the same url, only destinguished by the first path behind the reverse-proxies url.

Here a picture of the proposed architecture.

But here the trouble begins. We are currently not even able to create a functioning configuration for the sap-system to work properly.
Actually we use this as a rule for nginx for reverse-proxying to s4h. But this returns a Website from SAP with only a "error-tag":

 

 

server {
    listen                          443 http2 ssl;
    server_name                     www.xyz.com;

    large_client_header_buffers 4 16k;
    
    ## SSL Config xx
    
    underscores_in_headers on;
    location / {
        proxy_pass https://s4h.xyz-sap.com:443;
        client_max_body_size 100M;      
        proxy_set_header        Host $host;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Host $host:$server_port;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Server $host;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Port   443;

        
        # Go to next proxy upstream if first server is down.
        proxy_next_upstream error timeout http_500 http_502 http_503 http_504;
        proxy_connect_timeout 1200s;
        proxy_send_timeout 1200s;

        #proxy_hide_header location;
        proxy_buffer_size          1280k;
        proxy_buffers              4 2560k;
        proxy_busy_buffers_size    2560k;
    }

    # HSTS (ngx_http_headers_module is required) (15768000 seconds = 6 months)
    add_header Strict-Transport-Security max-age=15768000;

    error_log /var/log/nginx/xyz.com-error.log;
    access_log /var/log/nginx/xyz.com-access.log;
}

 

 


Any idea or help would be great. 

Kind regards
Matthias

entry.title: Re: SAP business Bydesign
entry.content: Dear customer, Thanks for your detailed information, I am checking this and will update you once anything gets found.

entry.title: Re: sap-sd error
entry.content: can you provide the link please

entry.title: Re: S4H with ePP/DS - purchase requisitions are created w...
entry.content:
Hi Walter,

I guess you have not setup an number range in PPDS in /SAPAPO/RRPCUST1.

 

Use Number Ranges

 

Use

  • If you set the indicator, the system creates an order number for an order that is created locally in SAP APO.
  • If you do not set the indicator, the system does not create a visible number for the order. You can process the order in the planning table, but you cannot call it up individually as the individual orders cannot be distinguished from one another due to the lack of the number.

Dependencies

  • The system creates the number on the basis of the number range interval that you have specified in the number range number field.
  • You define the number range in Customizing for Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling under Maintain Number Ranges for Orders.
  • For more information, see Local Orders and Order Numbers in the SAP APO System.

 

Number range number

Identifies a number range interval within an object or subobject.

 

Procedure

Enter any two-character code.

entry.title: Uniting our efforts for advancement of the global infrastructure
entry.content:
Across the globe, we're witnessing a remarkable era of infrastructure transformation. This month, we spotlight notable projects in the US, UK, Europe, China and Australia, illustrating the diversity and scale of efforts to modernize and enhance our world's infrastructure.

United States: The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (IIJA) is reshaping America’s infrastructure landscape, catalyzing projects across transportation, broadband, and public works. One key initiative is the Gateway Program between New York and New Jersey, set to significantly improve rail connectivity. 

United Kingdom: High Speed 2 (HS2) exemplifies the UK's ambition, aiming to revolutionize travel times and connectivity across the country. This project underscores a nationwide commitment to advanced infrastructure development. 

Europe: The Brenner Base Tunnel, bridging Austria and Italy, stands as a testament to Europe's dedication to sustainable and efficient transportation. This tunnel is a pivotal piece in the continent's infrastructure puzzle, enhancing the flow of goods and people across borders.

China: The Belt and Road Initiative (BRI), China's ambitious global infrastructure development strategy, continues to unfold, with significant investments across continents.  

Australia: The Melbourne Metro Tunnel project highlights Australia's focus on enhancing urban mobility and connectivity. This ambitious project is a cornerstone of Australia's infrastructure modernization efforts.

 

How SAP Can Help the World Run Better in Projects and Asset Lifecycle

In this dynamic landscape of global infrastructure projects, managing the end-to-end lifecycle of such endeavors presents a formidable challenge. SAP’s suite of solutions emerges as an essential ally, equipped with AI-driven analytics and predictive maintenance capabilities to optimize asset management and enhance performance.

AI and Railways: Taking asset performance to new heights 

 

SAP's software systems are adept at navigating the complexities inherent in large-scale projects, from inception through completion and ongoing maintenance. By leveraging SAP's robust capabilities, infrastructure projects worldwide can achieve greater efficiency, reliability, and sustainability.

Digital Transformation of Public Infrastructure in Aotearoa, New Zealand

 

Our commitment to improving project and asset lifecycle management with SAP's innovative solutions is not merely about adopting advanced technology; it's about fostering smarter, more connected, and sustainable development. As we continue to embrace monumental infrastructure projects, SAP stands ready to support these initiatives, ensuring they not only meet their goals but also contribute to a resilient and efficient global infrastructure ecosystem. 

The Executive’s Guide to IIJA Funding for Technology

entry.title: Re: how to use "Redis, Hyperscaler Option" in spring boot
entry.content:
For how to access from local machine see Access a Redis-cache Instance from Redis-cli | SAP Help Portal

I suppose you could take the approach described in Binding to Data Services with Spring Boot in Cloud Foundry. The credentials are available in VCAP_SERVICES. Caution: The project appears to be deprecated.

entry.title: Re: Model concept in SAC considering connection with S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

approach #2 is best practice and supported by several concepts.

1. See discovery center mission "Accelerate Financial Planning and Analysis": https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/missiondetail/3945/4146/?tab=overview

2. See how to integrate S/4HANA Cloud with SAC Planning, based on scope item 1YB: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/1cbcff7ccd35405ab445b223c1ab1588/2f610a5f08cb4142ac188c3e6a127b4e.html?locale=en-US

Kind regards
Christoph

entry.title: Re: BAdIs for MRP
entry.content:
Hello ALL,

First of all thanks for your blogs @Caetano they provides more information about  flexibility of MRP.

Recently we have a requirement for considering the customer consignment stock as available stock in MRP planning .

I know that the special stock is not considered in MRP assuming that it is a existing element therefore tried to use BADI-MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA method CONSIDER_CUSTCONSIGNMENT to Influence that MRP considers the CCS as available stock i have done below changes.

  METHOD if_ex_md_change_mrp_data~consider_custconsignment.
    ch_no_exit = abap_true.
    ch_changed = abap_true.
  ENDMETHOD.   

While running the MD02 and MD04 the BADI itself it is not triggering, i don't what mistake i have done here .

I also tried with BADI -  MD_ADD_ELEMENTS method ADD_CHANGE_ELEMENTS the with changing parameters CH_COPY_MDPSX,CH_CHANGED to X in this case the Badi got triggered but no value changed in MD04 .

In this Badi we want to add the DELKZ  = KK for customer consignment stock but the while checking in CH_COPY_MDPSX there is no entry for KK,is it there any option to consider the KK in this method 

Notes referred - 2012620,301681,

Can someone throw some light on this topic it would be really helpful, thanks 

Br,

Charan

entry.title: Re: Implement a More Efficient GIS-ERP Integration Following a Few Simple Steps
entry.content: Nice document

Thank you for your response. I just want to understand if it even makes sense to synchronize Azure user groups to SAP IAS ?

What are the advantages of syncing Azure user groups to SAP IAS ?

Many Thanks

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: New Client Copy Tool
entry.content:
Hello Dominik,

can you tell me whether a table comparison between ECC and S4 is possible with the transaction SCC_compare?

Regards, Ramona

entry.title: Re: Alternative to deprecated extractors in Production Pl...
entry.content:
Hi Gilou,

It's recommended use CDS view in S/4 system but there's no 1:1 mapping between CDS view and classic datasource. 

The following online provides the delivered CDS views:

CDS Views | SAP Help Portal

You can try to find the CDS view.  If no CDS can be found, you may open a SAP case under the corresponding application component. For example, for APO datasource, component is SCM-APO-SPP.

Regards,
Maggie

entry.title: FULL list of Payment terms for Customer
entry.content: Hi, I would like to know what is transaction code for to view the full list of payment terms for our customer?

entry.title: How to get all sernr of material at specific lgort
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How to get all sernr of material at specific lgort?
It quantity should be equal to MARD-LABST field.

I know the possibility to define a depreciation key with unit of production base method but I would like to know if there is any additional option..

Thanks and best regards,

Daniel Moreno

entry.title: Re: In SAP PO we are trying to extract an excel with all...
entry.content:
Hello rahulgowthamn,

Could you please check the video in this blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-consume-web-services-hosted-by-sap-pi-po/ba-p/13301986

You can use SOAP UI to get all ICOs in XML format. You can export XML data to an excel file. 

Good luck.

Caner.

entry.title: Re: 0WM_WO delta Data Source pulling data only once in a day
entry.content:
Hi Niroop,

"run 3 times day but it is pulling delta data only once in day"

--> What does this mean? Is the frequency of delta load decided by BW4 DTP?

Or do you mean the frequency of the collective run  /SCWM/BW10?

Regards,
Maggie

entry.title: Re: Additional SAP Community feeds 📡
entry.content: @DiegoValdivia @Jelena , you are right.... there was an issue in the platform, which was causing the data retrieved by the jobs, to generate feeds, was incorrect. The issue in the platform has now been fixed and the feeds should now be back to including proper data, e.g. there should be no comments in the blog post feeds and only include the data associated with that specific managed tag. See this issue for more information - https://github.com/ajmaradiaga/feeds/issues/11.

entry.title: test post - xyz
entry.content: this is a test post only, and will be deleted shortly.

entry.title: Re: Deliver Real-World Results with SAP Business AI: Q4 2023 & Q1 2024 Release Highlights
entry.content: Wow - it's indeed hard to keep up with all the embedded AI feature advancements in SAP's rich solution portfolio - thank you @philipp_herzig for helping us out here! Exciting journey we are on indeed with SAP Business AI supporting our customers to create real business value leveraging the latest (Gen)AI capabilities where it actually counts: embedded in their respective business workflow context. And we are just getting started 😉

entry.title: SAP Enterprise Support Academy Newsletter March 2024
entry.content:
Dear customers,
Find here an overview of the SAP Enterprise Support Academy monthly newsletter on latest news, training courses, upcoming sessions, and further educational offerings.
The SAP Enterprise Support Academy provides expert guidance and high impact knowledge transfer services that enable you to innovate and be successful with your SAP solutions.

Subscribe to regularly receive latest news and stay informed about the wide range of educational offerings provided by the SAP Enterprise Support Academy that help you to build the digital skills tailored to your needs.

Preview available live sessions on SAP Support Portal, tailored per region:
APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America*

Please note: A one-time registration for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support [accessible here] is necessary to register for these events.

Your Digital Badge on SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integration

Learn how SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central integration helps you to manage your HR processes while integrating the data to and from SAP ERP HCM and SAP SuccessFactors. How? Join our new virtual Learning Program and take the chance to gain a digital badge.

Full details

Safeguard Your SAP BW Conversion

Refresh your knowledge of support and empowerment services that are available from SAP Enterprise Support to safeguard your SAP BW project milestones. We have a blog full of detailed insights to take you through the key assets to successfully safeguard a transition from SAP NetWeaver BW.

Expand your knowledge here

SAP BTP Release Navigator Q1 2024 Update Available Now

Check out the latest update to the Release Navigator for SAP Business Technology Platform–with a new look, updated resources, and new consolidated release date information.

Access here: Release Navigator for SAP BTP

How to Get Started With SAP S/4HANA Finance

Are you about to start with SAP S/4HANA Finance? Then don’t miss our interactive virtual Mee-the-Expert live session on April 5 that helps you get on board.

Register here: Get started with SAP S/4HANA Finance

SAP S/4HANA Finance Fundamentals–Deep Dive

Join us in a multiday training session to discover everything you must know about delta capabilities in SAP S/4HANA Finance. We have new sessions in April and May, available in English, Chinese and Japanese language.

More in this blog post

E-Learning Series: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integration

We’re excited to announce the release of six-new E-Learnings available to help guide you through SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integration. Pick the E-learnings of your preference or take advantage of all courses. The following blog post introduces you to each.

E-Learning Series: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integration

Release Navigator for SAP Customer Experience: What’s New in Q1

This year's first update to release navigator for SAP CX is here. We‘ve made some UX improvements that were in high demand, and also updated the content for products that had a release this quarter. The release navigator brings together important release content from across the SAP ecosystem.

Read the blog post to learn what changes we’ve made: Release Navigator for SAP Customer Experience

Unlock the Future of SAP: Don't Miss These Sessions at SAP Sapphire 2024

Get ready for SAP Sapphire in Orlando, USA from June 3 to June 5, 2024. Read about the incredible lineup of sessions that promise to revolutionize the way you use SAP Technology. The sessions are unforgettable and packed with insights, innovations, and opportunities for growth.

Read all about it

BMW: Speeding up Transformation Into an Intelligent Enterprise

The SAP Business Transformation Center simplifies data migration and transformation, guiding customers through a user-friendly experience. This, combined with a long-standing partnership, helps BMW Group swiftly become an intelligent enterprise through sustainable and efficient solutions.

Read the full quote: sap.to/61100XbtEA

Scania Group: Standardizing and Simplifying Implementation

The Scania Group uses Focused Build and SAP Activate in tandem to standardize and simplify their SAP S/4HANA implementation. This collaborative approach facilitates a streamlined process, provides holistic project monitoring, and allows for data-driven decision-making, leading to a more controlled and efficient implementation.

Read more about the quote: sap.to/61109XLKUz

  • Guidance on signing up
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy Video
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy at a glance
  • Direct access to SAP Learning Hub (Login with your s-user ID and password)
  • SAP ES Academy Entitlement document
  • FAQ
  • SAP Enterprise Support value maps
  • SAP Support Portal
  • Basics: Sign up | Time zone setup |
  • Formats: EGI | MTE | AIE | Program
  • Search: Language | Keyword | Filter | Calendar
  • Upcoming live sessions in your region: APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America

entry.title: Re: SAP BI Asset Extraction Architecture in S4/ECC
entry.content: It's quite helpful ! Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic QR-Code thru URL in a OLE-Object for printing...
entry.content: Crystal images can't be loaded over https. If the new link doesn't work with http, you need to find another way.

entry.title: Check if PDF is interactive
entry.content:
hello. I m uploading PDF file using GUI_UPLOAD. And then converting to xstring using FM SCMS_BINARY_TO_XSTRING. 

I need to check if this PDF is interactive (editable) or not. How can I get this info? 

Looked at class cl_fp_pdf_object. But still cant find any method that returning me such info. 

tried cl_fp_pdf_object->get_metadata - but it returns empty metadata. 

Maybe exists some FMs that can give info

entry.title: SAPUI5: View doesn't load corresponding Controller after routing in ToolPage Layout
entry.content:
Hello experts!
I made some simple movie website using ToolPage layout like below.

view/App.view.xml

 

<mvc:View controllerName="my_namespace.controller.App"
  xmlns:html="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml"
  xmlns="sap.m"
  xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
  xmlns:tnt="sap.tnt"
  xmlns:core="sap.ui.core">
  <App id="app">
    <tnt:ToolPage id="toolPage">
      <tnt:header>
        <core:Fragment fragmentName="my_namespace.view.Header" />
      </tnt:header>
      <tnt:subHeader>
        <core:Fragment fragmentName="my_namespace.view.subHeader" />
      </tnt:subHeader>
      <tnt:mainContents>
        <NavContainer id="toolPageNavContainer">
          <pages></pages>
        </NavContainer>
      </tnt:mainContents>
    </tnt:ToolPage>
  </App>
</mvc:View>

 

 And I want to fix my header in every page and only switch mainContents using routing. So I wrote routing config in manifest.json file. 

manifest.json

 

{
 "routing": {
      "config": {
        "routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
        "type": "View",
        "viewType": "XML",
        "async": true,
        "viewPath": "my_namespace.view",
        "controlId": "toolPageNavContainer",
        "controlAggregation": "pages",
        "transition": "fade"
      },
      "routes": [
        {
          "pattern": "",
          "name": "home",
          "target": "movieList"
        },
        {
          "pattern": "movie/{movieId}",
          "name": "detail",
          "target": "movieDetail"
        },
        {
          "pattern": "profile",
          "name": "profile",
          "target": "profile"
        }
      ],
      "targets": {
        "movieList": {
          "viewName": "MovieList",
          "viewId": "movieListView"
        },
        "movieDetail": {
          "viewName": "MovieDetail",
          "viewId": "movieDetailView"
        },
        "profile": {
          "viewName": "Profile",
          "viewId": "profileView"
        }
      }
    },
    "rootView": {
      "viewName": "my_namespace.view.App",
      "type": "XML",
      "async": true,
      "id": "app"
    }
}

 

 The problem is when I refresh browser in my "movieDetail" page and navTo "home" page which targets MovieList.view.xml, the MovieList view shows up fine, but the MovieList.controller.js file doesn't load. However, it works fine in reverse.

refresh in movieDetail pageand navigate to home

And weird thing is when I refresh browser in my Profile page and navTo home page everything works fine.

How can this be possible? I already check every namespace of View and Controller files, but cannot find anything wrong.

I start this project using BAS Multitarget Application Template and attach application information. If you need more source code or some information please tag me. I will reply ASAP.

If you have encountered the same issue or have any idea what might be going wrong, please advise.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Enhance Standard Service Interface (Webservice) without PI
entry.content:
I have extended for Product inbound service and what I observed, data needs to be passed from third party system in below pattern

Custom name space needs to be passed with the name space definition. 

#Productwebservice #WebserviceextensionProduct #ProductProxyStructure

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I am Anagh Agarwal from India. I am currently working with Construction industry which is on of the least digitized industry and have experience of approximate 10 years.

I wish to pivot my career into digitization vertical within the construction domain itself. I identify myself as:

  • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life
  • First generation college student

Given the big sum to attain the SAP certification, it is difficult for me to pivot my career into digitization. Hence, I seek for your assistance in providing me free certification attempt to obtain certification for Implementing SAP S/4HANA cloud public edition.

Looking forward for your favorable reply please.

 

Regards,

Anagh Agarwal

Email ID - anaghagrwl@gmail.com

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Web UI Kit v1.106 for Figma
entry.content:
Hello, 

The S4HANA Web UI Kit v1.106 is an outdated library and we no longer support it. 
Please use the new version of the Web UI Kit. You can download it from the external Fiori guidelines: 
https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-web/design-stencils-for-figma/

Please note that we will publish the newest version on April 19th. Meanwhile feel free to use the one in the link I shared.

Best regards,
Loulou

entry.title: Access Request role search restriction using GRAC_ROLP and Rolename
entry.content:
Hi All, We have a business requirement where we are trying to restrict the roles a requestor can select while submitting an access request. In order to achieve this I'm trying to restrict the role selection using the auth object GRAC_ROLEP and Role name. In BRM we have Business roles named as ***** DENMAK , *** SWEDEN. I'm trying to use a string in the Role name however I'm getting the error- Unsuitable generic input for authorization changed. I came across sap note -3195139 regarding the error. Could someone assist me to know how can I achieve this?

Many Thanks,

Regards,Nandita

entry.title: Unable to replicate data due to Mass transfer ID is already being used to replicate data for table
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been running Datasphere replication flow for initial/Delta load for past couple of weeks. Recently, I stopped the job for some days. Now I am getting  error "Mass transfer ID is already being used to replicate data for table" when I try to restart the job.

How do I resolve this issue so that I can start a clean intitial/delta load.

 

/ thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP ME routing decision
entry.content:
This was fixed with patch 28.

3446494 - Obsolete next step link is not removed when new operation is inserted to existing routing on Production Order update from ERP - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh | End To End Tutorial with Cloud Platform Integration
entry.content: @ParatkarChinmay Thank you so much 🙏

entry.title: SAP PPM Evaluation all projects
entry.content:
Hi there, 

we started implementing SAP PPM and already created Portfolios, Projects, Termplates etc. 
Now that the process has started we wanted to evaluate the different projects.

There was this out of the box evaluation "Dates and Required Capacity" that fits perfect to our needs. 

Now the problem - we want to export this across all projects to excel.

Is there any possibility to do this with the standard? Any recommendations? 

Many thanks in advance.

Tobi

entry.title: Re: Converting C Code to Abap
entry.content: You shouldn't try to translate C to ABAP when you're learning ABAP, just like you shouldn't try to translate your native language to English when you're learning English. Translation is a more complex task than simply writing in the new language.

entry.title: Re: router Non-xml condition error as Invalid format of c...
entry.content:
Thanks Chris for response. I thought I made some mistake in condition.

With Groovy Its working fine. 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
def Message processData(Message message)
{
   def propertyMap = message.getProperties();
    def userId = propertyMap.get("userId");
    def C4C_ContactID = propertyMap.get("C4C_ContactID");
    def result;
    if ((userId == null || userId.length() == 0) &&  (C4C_ContactID == null || C4C_ContactID.length() == 0)){
            result = "true"
            message.setProperty("result", result); }
    else{ result = "false"
            message.setProperty("result", result); }
return message;
}

entry.title: Re: SAP PM Error-'Status Profile not allowed with Object...
entry.content:
Hi,

Check here same question. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/status-profile-not-allowed-for-object-type/qaq-p/6351553

entry.title: Re: How to determine with scripting whether a member is a...
entry.content:
Hi ThomasK,
I am working with SAP BW as source. If you are using another source this might not be the solution:

if you use your selection and retrieve the result set for it you can identify if your selection is a hierarchy node or a leaf either from its ID/naming convention or by the exclamation point in front of leafes.

 

var sel = this.getSelections()[0]["yourDimension"];
console.log(this.getDataSource().getResultSet({"yourDimension": sel, [Alias.MeasureDimension]: "yourMeasure"})[0]);

 

node: no exclamation point in front of ID and ID starts with 0HIER_NODE. You also get the parent hierarchy node:

leaf => exclamation point in front of ID 

br
edgar

entry.title: Need Guidance on Deleting Budget Version, Consumed Budgets, and Master Data in SAP
entry.content:
Need Guidance on Deleting Budget Version, Consumed Budgets, and Master Data in SAP

Hi SAP Community,

I am currently facing a challenge in my SAP environment related to deleting budget versions, consumed budgets, and master data. Despite going through various notes and resources on the community page, I haven't been able to find a clear solution for my specific scenario.

To provide some context, our client has encountered several obstacles post go-live regarding the budget, and they are now seeking to start afresh. However, I am unsure about the correct approach and steps to take in order to delete existing active budget version, consumed budgets, and associated master data.

Could someone please guide me on the step-by-step process for effectively deleting budget active version, consumed budgets, and master data in SAP? Any insights, tips, or recommended paths to follow would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best regards,

entry.title: What data sources can be used to combine "Customer Return ID" and "Invoice Request ID"?
entry.content:
What data sources can be used to combine "Customer Return ID" and "Invoice Request ID"?

When I release the "Customer Return document" in the workcenter "Sales Order>Return", I also register the credit memo.
Then an "Invoice Request" will be created after the "Customer Return".

I would like to check the "Customer Return" and "Invoice Request" in one line in Date Source and Report.

Please let me know the Data Source and key items that can achieve this!

entry.title: Re: Internal Table stack not filled
entry.content:
Have you solved this error?

Same error i'm also getting in VL01N Screen

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK attachment multi image selection at a time fo...
entry.content:
Hello Krishna, 

What you are seeing is the current behavior. We are aware of this limitation on iOS. There is a similar request posted by another customer on Influence site, please review. If this is exactly what you are looking for, feel free to vote. Otherwise, open a new feature request over there. 

We'll internally review the requirements posted on the influence site and will add an update accordingly. Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: SAP business Bydesign
entry.content: Dear customer, I check the system and understand that there is no common field exists among related data sources. Hence, combining data sources wouldn't work and fulfill your request. I note that in customer return document, the inbound delivery ID information exists under Items - Details Subtab. But this doesn't show in Data Source " "Customer Returns Item". Then I try to use a workaround that creating a custom OData query based on BO Customer Return to get the inbound delivery ID, but no related information can be received in the response payload. Therefore, we would recommend posting your query that adding Inbound Delivery ID for Data Source "Customer Returns Item" in Influence Forum so that our Development Colleagues will look into this. Note you may search for and if not found, register your requirement for this feature in the SAP Business ByDesign Customer Influence Forum, at https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886 Best regards, Gavan SAP Support| Logistics Area Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration Looping Process Call
entry.content: @rasjoshi If we mark the throw exception when it reaches the maximum iteration, we will get the data equal to the number of iterations we specified, since it exceeds the number of iterations. If we count the API with the $count parameter when triggering it in Postman, we can view how many pages will arrive on average. And we can determine an average number of iterations. We should increase the number of iterations just in case. The number of iterations is a process that will prevent lost data. If you want, you can also give 9999 here. Integration ends when there is no more data inside.

entry.title: PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option - Credentials for db owner
entry.content:
Hi all,

Anyone knows how to get the credentials for owner of the generated db?, it's really interesting that the provided users ( bindings & service keys ) are not the owners, and every new binding / service key is generating a new user in the db...

 

Kind Regards.

Max.

entry.title: Re: Mandatory lower level WBS elements
entry.content:
Hi,

Just to share one option, you can block account assignment on Level 1, so that will force creating further levels for account assignment elements.

Regards,

Paulo

entry.title: Re: Convergent Invoice Document Set Printing Lock/Unlock
entry.content: Glad to hear from you Rhoresh.

entry.title: Re: How to use Fiori-Launchpad and integrated 3rd-Party W...
entry.content:
Did you tried to use SAP WEBDISPATCHER? Beside the obvious function that the name carries, it can also work as a reverse proxy (mostly used on DMZ's to expose FIORI to the outside world).

Please look into these links: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLsVqYCxOaxJkxBDL8nVb2I6bnQ-_escOO, https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/si/3362959690.html.

entry.title: Re: Onboarding to SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition - Setup and Configuration
entry.content:
Hello @jeyaseelan_j ,

Could you verify that your user is assigned to the "Workzone_Admin" Group in the IAS and/or BTP Cockpit?
It might be beneficial to rerun the provisioning job from the IAS and review the logs for any updates on your user.

entry.title: To find out and analyze what tables and programs user accessed past 6 months using which roles.
entry.content:
we are trying to restrict S_PROGRAM with * value 

To find out and analyze what tables and programs user accessed past 6 months.

1. we have checked the program/table usage via SM20 logs for users but is there any way to check in S/4  system for program/table usage of user through which role it is being accessed through any other standard tcode /reports?


2.If we have any other possible way to get the program/table usage of users and through which role it is being accessed through any GRC standard tcode/report?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: To find out and analyze what tables and programs user...
entry.content:
Hello,

the answer for both questions is 'No'.

There is no log for which 'role' granted an authorization for a certain action in the SAP system, for which an authority-check was performed.

Background: a role is just a box, which contains, beyond other data, the authorization profile. This profile contains the authorizations. the authority-check, which is logged in the system, compares only that authorizations with the requested values in the coding (abap statement 'authority-check'). With which 'boxes' an authorization was assigned to a user does not matter at all and is not evaluated (also because of a performance reason).

 

If the admin does not know, with which roles he assigned which authorizations to a user, he can still use SUIM to find that out. (for instance by using the report 'users by authorization values')

 

The best way to find out, which authorizations a user really requires is, to use the long term trace 'STUSERTRACE' (see also SAP note 2220030 ). It records each auth.-check once for each environment. After some time (some weeks/month) all the checks are available in the trace result (filter for instance for object S_PROGRAM). Furthermore a role can be created directly from the trace result, containing only that required authorization values (see also SAP note 2353127 ).

 

b.rgds,
Bernhard

entry.title: Screen Layout question on ME29N transaction -prevent price change
entry.content:
We used configuration IMG ==> MM ==> Purchasing ==> Purchase Order and click on Define Screen Layout at Document Level to create screen layout ME29N where all price related fields including "Price and Price unit" has been changed  from Optional entry to Display to ensure user can not change a price in ME29N. However Condition record still being editable , does not prevent user to change a condition value and alter the price in ME29N. Is there any option to grey out as well a condition field ? ( Attachments provided to support question ) 

Thanks for help

Lidia

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori (APP Server)のvCPU数増強について
entry.content:
S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition関連のSKU番号や各SKUの詳細は、Sell Authorizationを取得されたパートナー様向けに公開している情報となります。

これらのSKUに関してご質問がある場合には、Partner Cloud Architect (PCA) 向けのPrivate Communityページにて質問を受け付けておりますので、そちらをご活用ください。

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (SAP Community):
https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-s-4hana-cloud-private-edition/ct-p/s4hc-prved

entry.title: Re: How to get all sernr of material at specific lgort
entry.content:
Be aware that MARD-LABST relates to Valuated Unrestricted-Use Stock, so your assertion of 'It quantity should be equal to MARD-LABST field' can be false. (e.g. part is not valuated or some strock is on hold)

Did you already

  • Look at tables such as EQBS and EQUI
  • Try to trace/debug MMBE

entry.title: Re: Had http 404 error on IBP supply chain topics for last week. It was working 2 weeks back.
entry.content:
Hi @MallikarjunB
Thank you for testing.
I passed the outcome of your test result to the respective SAP experts. who are currently analyzing this case.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to do the accrual recalculation based on the work...
entry.content:
Hello Abdul,

usually I don´t give concrete implementation guide links, cause honestly, this is what I expect first before asking in this forum: a thorough reading of the implementation guide, especially the rule functions guide. But this one is indeed a bit hidden. So, you are lucky 😉

Here we go, this is what you need:
Calculate Average Value For Numeric Job Info Field() | SAP Help Portal

And the termination issue should not be one. The rule function has got a calculation period. Choose "accruable period" then only the time till termination is considered.

Best regards

Volker

entry.title: Partioning of table /BI0/F0SM_UPL_Y
entry.content:
which method is suitable for Partitioning  of table /BI0/F0SM_UPL_Y.  As we have house keep job has set and working fine. We kept 5 years retention as per the customer requirement and basic cleanup has been already.

current count is 1.5B. Could you please let me know which partitioning  is suitable for this log table and which key field i have to consider as we have many key fields in this table
